//: Recommended permissions for a repo using the plug-in agent org. Copy this into .claude/settings.json (merge with any existing permissions block). Extend `allow` with your stack's build/test commands (e.g. Bash(npm test:*), Bash(cargo test:*)) and your source write-scopes (e.g. Write(src/**), Write(apps/**)); point the `ask` deploy entry at your deploy command. The verify-on-write hook ships with the plugin itself.
